description: The travel platform needs a graph-based collaborative filtering recommendation engine in demodb. Using OrientDB Studio at http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html (credentials: root / GymAnything123!), create a SimilarTraveler edge class (mandatory SharedHotelCount INTEGER, SimilarityScore DOUBLE) linking every pair of Profiles that share 2 or more Hotels via HasStayed edges, with one edge in each direction; set SharedHotelCount to the co-visited hotel count and SimilarityScore to SharedHotelCount divided by the total distinct hotels either profile visited (Jaccard similarity). Using these similarity edges, create a HotelRecommendation vertex class (mandatory TargetEmail STRING, HotelName STRING, RecommendedBy STRING, Score DOUBLE; UNIQUE composite index on TargetEmail and HotelName) with one vertex per profile-hotel pair where a similar traveler stayed at a hotel the target profile has not; set Score to the maximum SimilarityScore among recommenders and RecommendedBy to that recommender's email. Summarize the results in a single RecommendationReport vertex (mandatory TotalRecommendations INTEGER, ProfilesWithRecommendations INTEGER, MostRecommendedHotel STRING being the hotel appearing most often with ties broken alphabetically, HighestSimilarityPair STRING formatted as email1|email2 with emails alphabetically ordered, ReportBatch STRING set to collab_q1_2026).
